title: Assistant Store Manager - Big Bazaar - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Big Bazaar - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
